title: Can you add this?
description: Given two integers, calculate and output their sum.
inputDesc: The input contains several test cases. The first line contains and integer t (t ≤ 100) denoting the number of test cases. Then t tests follow, each of them consisiting of two space separated integers x and y (−109 ≤ x, y ≤ 109).
outputDesc: For each test case output output the sum of the corresponding integers.
